title: Top Eleven Be Football Manager
notes: We’ve shown red cards to a few bugs and made some other improvements and optimizations in this latest Top Eleven release! Good luck in your next match, Managers!

title: 新武俠大明星
notes:
【全新內容】
1. 新玩法——古墓迷蹤：
更新後幫會活動將上線全新玩法——古墓迷蹤，少俠將與幫會成員一同探索古墓獲取豐厚的寶藏獎勵！
幫會全員在古墓中消耗火摺子解鎖地塊，每次解鎖均可收穫探墓積分，並觸發隨機事件；探索途中還會遭遇各式怪物與守門首領，挑戰首領後可開啟下一層古墓入口，向更深處繼續探險。
古墓總共可深入至第30層，最深處將會登場一名無限血量的終極首領。少俠對其造成的傷害越高，所能獲得的探墓積分就越多。活動結束後將依據積分進行排行，躋身排行榜前列可領取豐厚珍稀獎勵！
2. 新賽季——海月升平
魔龍現世，歸墟一戰，全新賽季將于6月24日正式開啟。
在本賽季中，各位少俠將迎來新的爭霸玩法，攻克城池首領，即時對戰交鋒，多樣陣營博弈，等待各位少俠前來體驗！

A Hide & Seek Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can play as Mysterious Grimkin Hosts, who transform into furniture and hide, or as Investigative Journalists, who use the Survey Drone to find and capture them.

[Parkour Party]
A Parkour Party has been added to the Party system. D.G. Members can use pillars, walls, and platforms to create obstacle courses and enjoy building challenges with others.

title: Sky: Children of the Light
notes:
Art You Can Walk Through
Explore beautiful, playable environments made from Van Gogh's best known paintings, from sunlit fields in the Netherlands to the glowing night skies that only he could imagine. Each and every landscape is a work of art in motion, rendered in his bold, expressive brushstroke style and alive with the emotion he poured into every canvas.

For details: http://bit.ly/sky-patchnotes

Follow us for news:
- Discord/Facebook/X/Instagram/TikTok: @thatskygame
- YouTube/Twitch: @tha

A passionate chef is stuck on the sidelines with her truck out of commission! Help get her skills on the road just in time for our summer events! Cross the finish lines and celebrate with our Summertime Sale!

-NEW EVENT: Racing Ranking!
-NEW MAKEOVER: Tasting Success!
-RETURNING EVENT: Cruising for First!
-NEW SALE: Summertime Sale!
-60 new levels!

title: Coin Master - Board Adventure
notes: Welcome to Coin Master: Board Adventure, where every dice roll takes you closer to riches, revenge, and all-out fun! Collect coins, attack villages, build your empire, and explore wild new boards full of surprises. It's not just a board game - it's a bold adventure!

title: Overgeared Hero: Merge RPG
notes:
- Aria of the Beach - Fixed an issue in "Beach Star Selection" that prevented re-entry into stages that had already been cleared.
- Aria of the Beach - Fixed an issue in "Beach Star Selection" where the entry restriction time for the next stage was not displayed.
- Rankings - Fixed an issue where the list of participating servers was not displayed in Clan Ranking.
- Clan - Clan Raid - Fixed an issue where the list of participating servers was not displayed in Clan Ranking.

title: Magic Chess: Go Go
notes:
1. New feature Magic Auction is live! Your auction legend begins now!
2. New Commander Freya makes her debut! Explore the new patch to get Freya, new Battle Emotes, and other rewards for free!
3. The highly anticipated alliance battle mode is officially live! Team up with others and experience the thrill of team fights!
4. Premium skin Chou "Northern Fist" is now live! Ling "Serene Plume" also makes a return!
5. Lantern Wish is now live! Participate to get Zilong "Summer Waves"!

title: Family Island — Farming game
notes:
Hey Islanders!
We're always improving Family Island! This update includes bug fixes, performance enhancements, and a whole lot of love to make your island life even better.
Explore, adventure, and win amazing rewards!
Want to share the fun? Invite your friends to play and get FREE REWARDS! Join our community on Facebook and Instagram for more fun.
Loving Family Island? Leave a review!
